confidence_rationale: Camera angle makes precise measurement of suture deviation challenging. Knot formation and hand switching clearly visible. Completion time well-documented.

technique_summary: Solid intermediate-level performance with proper surgical technique. All required elements completed including surgeon's knot formation and alternating hand throws.
strengths: Consistent hand alternation between all throws
Proper surgeon's knot double throw technique
No visible gaps in drain slit closure
improvement_suggestions: Focus on more precise needle placement at marked targets
